ir𓁹ينجح، يُثري، يصونsucceed, make prosperous, maintain

meaning_ar2: do, make, create, beget (human beings), make, construct (concrete things), make (decrees, laws, written documents), make abstracts (e.g. trouble), make a (fair) name, make actions (e.g. an assault), make (a flight), make (noise)
